backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three requirements: role-based accordion rendering in the internal dashboard, three sub-sections per role, and passing a valid role prop from App.tsx to InternalDashboard.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Asistenku React app, mounting the app at #root and loading the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with public and app layouts; the /dashboard/internal route renders InternalDashboard with role="Admin" to enable full accordion view testing.
frontend/src/components/Closing.tsx: Simple centered section displaying a single closing statement about Asistenku's service quality commitment.
frontend/src/components/ConversionStatem: Centered muted-background section with two paragraphs explaining that service unit conversion is handled by Asistenku, not the client.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with the Asistenku icon, copyright notice, and navigation links to WhatsApp Concierge, Internal Login, and Partner Portal.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with the Asistenku logo, desktop navigation (Layanan anchor, Daftar, Masuk), and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Two-column hero section with a two-line heading, description text, and CTA buttons for smooth-scrolling to services or opening a WhatsApp chat.
frontend/src/components/HowWeSupport.tsx: Centered section listing the four-step Asistenku support process with a closing statement about client focus on decisions only.
frontend/src/components/JoinTeam.tsx: Centered call-to-action section inviting users to join the Asistenku team with a button linking to the TentangPartner page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Dashboard: A layout wrapper for dashboard pages that accepts a custom header and children, rendering them within a full-height flex column with a fixed footer.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCards.tsx: Renders a 2-column accordion grid of four service pricing tiers (TENANG, RAPI, FOKUS, JAGA), each showing emoji, title, price, unit count, and an expandable full description.
frontend/src/components/TimelyDelivery.t: A simple static section component displaying a centered heading and paragraph about timely, parallel task execution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file; no backend queries are implemented yet for this UI-only landing page.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and utility classes for brand colors teal and navy.
frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.tsx: A minimal authenticated app layout that renders a full-height flex container with a TanStack Router Outlet as the main content area.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapping pages with a shared Header and Footer around a TanStack Router Outlet.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx: A client registration form page with fields for name, email, WhatsApp, and optional company, where all inputs and submit are disabled until the user clicks the Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.ts: Internal dashboard page rendering role-based summary cards, list data, and history sections for AdminUser, AdminFinance, Asistenmu, and Concierge roles, with collapsible accordions per role.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardClient.tsx: Client dashboard page showing active services, task summary counts, and a filterable task list with status badges, plus a modal for submitting new task requests, all using dummy data.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPartner.tsx: Partner dashboard page displaying mock partner profile, task summaries, and task lists (assigned, in-progress, revision, QA, history) with collapsible sections and filtering UI.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that composes the main landing page by rendering Hero, HowWeSupport, TimelyDelivery, ConversionStatement, ServiceCards, JoinTeam, and Closing sections.
frontend/src/pages/InternalPortal.tsx: Internal portal page with Internet Identity login, an internal dashboard entry button, a registration form, and a claim admin/superadmin button, all gated behind login state.
frontend/src/pages/PartnerPortal.tsx: Partner portal page with Internet Identity login, a partner dashboard entry button, and a partner registration form (name, email, WhatsApp, city), all gated behind login state.
frontend/src/pages/TentangPartner.tsx: Informational page describing how Asistenku partners work, covering workflow, level/verification system, transparent work standards, and placement criteria.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by its ID using scrollIntoView.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the InternalDashboard project, including architecture notes, existing implemented features, known issues, and pending feature requests for role-based rendering at /dashboard/internal.
